item.title: Burger King testing AI headset that will know if workers say 'welcome' or 'thank you'
item.description: Burger King is testing AI-powered headsets that can recite recipes, alert managers when inventories are low and even track how friendly employees are ...

item.title: The EU will 'provisionally implement' a trade deal with South American bloc Mercosur
item.description: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen says she will start to “provisionally implement” a massive trade deal with the Mercosur bloc of nat...

item.title: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney arrives in India to repair a strained relationship
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney is visiting India to reset strained ties and push deeper trade cooperation with New Delhi

item.title: World shares are mostly higher in a week dominated by AI news
item.description: Shares are mostly higher in Europe and Asia after the worst day for Nvidia’s stock since last spring dragged the U.S. market lower

item.title: South Korea allows Google to export map data after years of frustration over Google Maps
item.description: South Korea’s government says it will allow Google to export detailed mapping data of the country to overseas servers under certain security requireme...
